title: Pet Phrase Plus 2
description: add some decoration in your chat
body:
为聊天增添独特魅力，让你的服务器形象更加个性鲜明，喵~

本模组支持正则表达式替换，实现高度个性化定制，例如：
- `$`->`nya`:在句尾添加nya
- `[0-9]+`->`[#0]`:在数字外加上[]


Enhance your chat messages with a touch of flair, making your presence on the server uniquely charming, meow~

This mod supports regular expression replacements for high customization, such as:
- `$` -> `nya`: Adds 'nya' to the end of sentences.
- `[0-9]+` -> `[#0]`: Puts numbers within brackets.
